info.name: Recognize Backend
info.summary: On-premises classification of audio, images, video and faces for Nextcloud TaskProcessing.
info.description:
**Requires [`AppAPI`](https://github.com/cloud-py-api/app_api) to work.**
A Nextcloud ExApp that provides TaskProcessing providers for the classification task types contributed by the [Recognize](https://github.com/nextcloud/recognize) app:
* `recognize:audio:classification` — Audio Spectrogram Transformer fine-tuned on AudioSet * `recognize:image:classification` — ConvNeXt V2 (Large) pretrained on ImageNet-22k * `recognize:image:facerecognition` — InsightFace `buffalo_l` (SCRFD + ArcFace) face embeddings * `recognize:video:classification` — VideoMAE (Large) fine-tuned on Kinetics-400
All models are loaded through their canonical Python libraries (Hugging Face `transformers`, `insightface`) rather than being reimplemented.
## Ethical AI Rating ### Rating: 🟡
Positive: * the software for training and inference of all models is open source * the trained models are freely available, and thus can be run on-premises
Negative: * the training data of the models is not freely available, limiting the ability of external parties to check and correct for bias or optimise the model's performance and CO2 usage.
Learn more about the Nextcloud Ethical AI Rating [in our blog](https://nextcloud.com/blog/nextcloud-ethical-ai-rating/).
info.author: Marcel Klehr

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_AUDIO_MODEL
variable.description: Hugging Face model id for audio classification. Default: MIT/ast-finetuned-audioset-10-10-0.4593

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_IMAGE_MODEL
variable.description: Hugging Face model id for image classification. Default: facebook/convnextv2-large-22k-384

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_VIDEO_MODEL
variable.description: Hugging Face model id for video classification. Default: MCG-NJU/videomae-large-finetuned-kinetics

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_FACE_MODEL
variable.description: InsightFace model pack name for face recognition. Default: buffalo_l

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_AUDIO_TOP_K
variable.description: Maximum number of categories returned per audio file. Default: 5

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_AUDIO_THRESHOLD
variable.description: Minimum probability for an audio category to be returned (float 0..1). Default: 0.2

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_MUSIC_GENRE_ENABLED
variable.description: Set to 0 to skip running the music-genre classifier even when AudioSet thinks the clip is music. Default: 1

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_MUSIC_GENRE_MODEL
variable.description: Hugging Face model id for music genre classification. Default: dima806/music_genres_classification

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_MUSIC_GENRE_TOP_K
variable.description: Maximum number of genre labels concatenated onto the AudioSet labels for music clips. Default: 3

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_MUSIC_GENRE_THRESHOLD
variable.description: Minimum probability for a genre label to be appended (float 0..1). Default: 0.25

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_MUSIC_DETECTION_THRESHOLD
variable.description: Minimum AudioSet probability on any "music"/"singing" label required to trigger the genre head (float 0..1). Default: 0.3

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_IMAGE_TOP_K
variable.description: Maximum number of categories returned per image. Default: 5

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_IMAGE_THRESHOLD
variable.description: Minimum probability for an image category to be returned (float 0..1). Default: 0.15

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_VIDEO_TOP_K
variable.description: Maximum number of categories returned per video. Default: 5

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_VIDEO_THRESHOLD
variable.description: Minimum probability for a video category to be returned (float 0..1). Default: 0.15

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_VIDEO_FRAMES
variable.description: Number of evenly spaced frames sampled per video clip. Default: 16

variable.name: RECOGNIZE_FACE_DET_SIZE
variable.description: Square input size in pixels for the face detector. Default: 1024

variable.name: TASK_POLLING_INTERVAL
variable.description: Seconds between polls for new TaskProcessing jobs when idle. Default: 5
